race.description: Social Packs From Just 30 Euros Maiden
race.comment: ENCELADUS (10) placed third in both of his maidens last season with the latest effort reading quite well. Looks sure to appreciate the step up in trip and will be hard to beat. TROJAN FIGHTER (16) now has a first time hood and tongue strap fitted after finishing fourth debuting at Navan on heavy ground. Will improve and rates highly. ALMAZANN (8) is the first of two runners for the Aga Khan stable. By Zarak out of a Sea The Stars mare and he makes plenty of appeal on debut for Dermot Weld. The second runner in those colours will be REYNIR (12) who was fifth on debut at Gowran Park. Serious consideration.

favourite.owners: EXORS OF THE LATE H H AGA KHAN
